query:
SELECT 
  s.id, s.sceneIndex, s.status as sceneStatus, s.taskId, s.errorMessage, s.updatedAt,
  j.status as jobStatus, j.errorMessage as jobError
FROM musicVideoScenes s
JOIN musicVideoJobs j ON j.id = s.jobId
WHERE s.jobId = 540001
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
